Kissimmee Restaurant Health Grades

66%Grade A
4.2Avg rating
175Restaurants

Explore 175 restaurants in Kissimmee, Osceola County, Central Florida, with health inspection grades, dietary options, and diner ratings. 115 currently hold an A health grade.

Kissimmee restaurant health grades — FAQ

How are Kissimmee restaurant health grades calculated?

Florida issues no official grades, so we calculate an A–F score from each restaurant's most recent DBPR inspection — starting at 100 points and deducting for high-priority, intermediate, and basic violations. Of the 175 Kissimmee restaurants we grade, 115 currently hold an A.

Does Florida assign letter grades to Kissimmee restaurants?

No. The Florida Department of Business and Professional Regulation (DBPR) inspects restaurants and records violations but does not grade them. The grades shown here are calculated by us from those public inspection records.

How many restaurants are graded in Kissimmee?

We currently publish 175 graded restaurants in Kissimmee, with an average diner rating of 4.2 stars; 115 hold an A health grade.

See the full scoring method on our methodology page.

Central Florida Restaurants

Restaurant health inspection grades, dietary options, and diner ratings across Central Florida. Inspection data from Florida DBPR public records.
